tools.name: create_issue
tools.description: Creates an issue in the repository with a title and body.

tools.name: list_prs
tools.description: Lists the open pull requests for the current repository.

tools.name: get_file
tools.description: Fetches the contents of a file at a given path and ref.

tools.name: add_comment
tools.description: Adds a comment to an existing issue or pull request.

tools.name: list_branches
tools.description: Lists all branches in the repository ordered by name.

tools.name: create_label
tools.description: Creates a label with a name and color for triage.

tools.name: assign_user
tools.description: Assigns a user to an issue so ownership is clear.

tools.name: close_issue
tools.description: Closes an issue once the work has been completed.

tools.name: search_code
tools.description: Searches the codebase for a query string and returns matches.

tools.name: get_commit
tools.description: Returns the metadata for a single commit by its sha.

tools.name: list_releases
tools.description: Lists the published releases for the repository.

tools.name: create_branch
tools.description: Creates a new branch from a given base branch.

tools.name: merge_pr
tools.description: Merges an approved pull request into its base branch.
